sys_variable_value.value: { "Title": "Superman", "Year": "2025", "Rated": "PG-13", "Released": "11 Jul 2025", "Runtime": "129 min", "Genre": "Action, Adventure, Sci-Fi", "Director": "James Gunn", "Writer": "James Gunn, Jerry Siegel, Joe Shuster", "Actors": "David Corenswet, Rachel Brosnahan, Nicholas Hoult", "Plot": "Superman must reconcile his alien Kryptonian heritage with his human upbringing as reporter Clark Kent. As the embodiment of truth, justice and the human way he soon finds himself in a world that views these as old-fashioned.", "Language": "English", "Country": "United States, Canada, Australia, New Zealand", "Awards": "2 nominations total", "Poster": "https://m.media-amazon.com/images/M/MV5BOGMwZGJiM2EtMzEwZC00YTYzLWIxNzYtMmJmZWNlZjgxZTMwXkEyXkFqcGc@._V1_SX300.jpg", "Ratings": [ { "Source": "Internet Movie Database", "Value": "7.6/10" }, { "Source": "Rotten Tomatoes", "Value": "83%" }, { "Source": "Metacritic", "Value": "68/100" } ], "Metascore": "68", "imdbRating": "7.6", "imdbVotes": "228,380", "imdbID": "tt5950044", "Type": "movie", "DVD": "N/A", "BoxOffice": "$340,890,135", "Production": "N/A", "Website": "N/A", "Response": "True", "Error": "Movie not found!" }

As the embodiment of truth, justice and the human way he soon finds himself in a world that views these as old-fashioned."},{"name":"Language","children":[],"type":"string","jpath":"$.Language","previewValue":"English"},{"name":"Country","children":[],"type":"string","jpath":"$.Country","previewValue":"United States, Canada, Australia, New Zealand"},{"name":"Awards","children":[],"type":"string","jpath":"$.Awards","previewValue":"2 nominations sys_variable_value.value: { "Title": "Superman", "Year": "2025", "Rated": "PG-13", "Released": "11 Jul 2025", "Runtime": "129 min", "Genre": "Action, Adventure, Sci-Fi", "Director": "James Gunn", "Writer": "James Gunn, Jerry Siegel, Joe Shuster", "Actors": "David Corenswet, Rachel Brosnahan, Nicholas Hoult", "Plot": "Superman must reconcile his alien Kryptonian heritage with his human upbringing as reporter Clark Kent. As the embodiment of truth, justice and the human way he soon finds himself in a world that views these as old-fashioned.", "Language": "English", "Country": "United States, Canada, Australia, New Zealand", "Awards": "2 nominations total", "Poster": "https://m.media-amazon.com/images/M/MV5BOGMwZGJiM2EtMzEwZC00YTYzLWIxNzYtMmJmZWNlZjgxZTMwXkEyXkFqcGc@._V1_SX300.jpg", "Ratings": [ { "Source": "Internet Movie Database", "Value": "7.6/10" }, { "Source": "Rotten Tomatoes", "Value": "83%" }, { "Source": "Metacritic", "Value": "68/100" } ], "Metascore": "68", "imdbRating": "7.6", "imdbVotes": "228,380", "imdbID": "tt5950044", "Type": "movie", "DVD": "N/A", "BoxOffice": "$340,890,135", "Production": "N/A", "Website": "N/A", "Response": "True", "Error": "Movie not found!" }
